item.title: BlackRock’s Asia Private Credit Fund Sees China Borrower Default
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: A BlackRock Inc. private credit fund in Asia has suffered the first default by a borrower in its portfolio after a Chinese company failed to repay a loan, according to people familiar with the matter. The delinquency occurred on April 1, after Metcold Holdings Ltd., a Shanghai-based cold-chain infrastructure service provider, failed to repay the loan’s outstanding principal of $27.5 million, said the people who requested anonymity discussing private matters.
